name: @deckup/theme-minimal
description: A document-like monochrome theme with clean sans-serif typography and minimal decoration.

cover.description: Centers a bold opening title and subtitle in a spacious monochrome composition.

default.description: Presents general content in a vertically centered, left-aligned document layout.

number.description: Highlights a key metric with an oversized bold number and restrained caption.

page.description: Organizes detailed content beneath a full-width heading with a thin divider.

quote.description: Centers an italic quotation with a quiet gray quotation mark and attribution.

section.description: Introduces a new section with a centered semibold heading and generous whitespace.

statement.description: Centers a single large sans-serif statement without decorative elements.

two-column.description: Places a divided heading above two balanced content columns with compact spacing.
